Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to GitLab. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to GitLab and accessed new repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. The repository is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to GitLab on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to a new instance of GitLab on host {event_src.host}. The instance is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to GitLab on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} using a new agent logged in to GitLab on host {event_src.host}. The agent is missing from the collected profile.
